name: Ritesh Firodiya
title: Ritesh Firodiya — Engineer who ships
headline: Engineer who ships.
tagline: ~9 years across web, mobile, and backend. Currently building AI tools on Anthropic SDK + MCP.
about: I'm a full-stack engineer and lead with about nine years shipping production TypeScript across React, Next.js, React Native, and NestJS. Most recently, I spent a year as a Senior Engineer at Walmart on internal revenue tooling — wrapped up May 2026.

Before that I ran short-term contract engagements (TopLegal as Tech Lead, ManifestIT, Speechify), and held senior IC roles at Masai, Swiggy, Globant, and Confluxsys. I move comfortably across the stack — Postgres schema, GraphQL APIs, React/RN UI, EAS releases — and I've shipped solo on monorepos using Turborepo + Yarn workspaces.
Right now I'm building a handful of personal products on the side and going deep on agent-based developer tooling with the Anthropic SDK and MCP.
currently: Open to senior / staff IC and tech-lead roles. Always up to chat about engineering, product, and AI tooling.

experiences.description: Built and shipped on an internal revenue management system across web and mobile. Worked end-to-end across React, React Native, TypeScript, and Node.
Led architecture and delivery of a contract management platform. Owned GraphQL schema design, DynamoDB modeling, and team direction during the engagement.
Built complex UI workflows for a CMDB management tool in Next.js, integrating against backend services and shipping iteratively with the team.
Worked on a multiplatform TTS SDK and the Dubbing Studio — a video-translation product. Full-stack across Svelte components and GraphQL APIs.
Took multiple applications from idea to production with full delivery ownership. Mentored junior engineers across React, Node, GraphQL, Prisma, and AWS.
Shipped consumer-app features in React/TypeScript/Node. Worked on auth and ticketing modules; partnered with PM/QA on production triage.
Web applications for banking and auditing clients. Pixel-accurate UI work in React, integrating backend systems via Node.
Full-stack engineer at a startup. Shipped frontend, backend, and database work with end-to-end delivery ownership.

projects.name: Codestar
projects.description: A TypeScript CLI that scans a repository, builds persistent memory of its structure, and runs agent loops over the code with git automation. Built on the Anthropic SDK and Model Context Protocol — what I'm investing the most time in right now.

projects.name: DwarSeva
projects.tagline: Society management platform for Tier-2/3 cities
projects.description: Multi-tenant platform for residential societies — visitor logs, billing, notices, resident app. Backend, web admin, and mobile share a single Turborepo monorepo with NestJS + GraphQL + Prisma at the core.

projects.name: Scrvio
projects.description: A Loom-style screen recorder with orgs/workspaces, auth, and Stripe-powered billing. Roadmap includes AI transcription and summaries on top of self-hosted storage.

projects.name: Aakalan
projects.description: Local-first expense tracker that parses UPI payment notifications. Zustand + MMKV for state, SQLite for storage, PostHog for analytics, RevenueCat + AdMob for monetization.

education.institution: P.V.G. College of Engineering and Technology
